summary: Completed backend and frontend validation for room privacy (public/private create+join), including two-step private join UX and room page regression checks.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend still has legacy validation branches returning {"error": ...} with HTTP 200 in some endpoints (including room/message related validations). For long-term API contract safety, prefer consistent 4xx HTTPException responses.

success_rate.frontend: 100% for requested room privacy and room-page regression flows

test_credentials: Read from /app/memory/test_credentials.md; preview auth uses dev bypass user test@izlek.dev (MOCKED auth).
seed_data_creation: Created TEST rooms and profile update for firebase_uid=dev-user through public API during test run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated on public preview URL from frontend/.env. Private room flow: password field appears only after code lookup in join flow; wrong password rejected (403), correct password accepted. Public room join remains direct without password. Timer/chat/participants UI on RoomPage still works after privacy changes.
rca of the issue: No blocking issue reproduced in requested scope. One intermediate Playwright failure was due test script expecting join form before switching to join tab (test script sequencing issue, not app bug).
